title: Equity Residential (EQR) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call July 28, 2023 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Martin McKenna - First VP, Investor & Public Relations Mark Parrell - President, CEO & Trustee Michael Manelis - EVP & COO Alexander Brackenridge - EVP & CIO Robert Garechana - EVP & CFO Conference Call Participants Eric Wolfe - Citi John Pawlowski - Green Street Advisors Steve Sakwa - Evercore ISI Josh Dennerlein - Bank of America Merrill Lynch John Kim - BMO Capital Markets Jamie Feldman - Wells Fargo Securities Haendel St. Juste - Mizuho Securities Alexander Goldfarb - Piper Sandler & Co. Michael Goldsmith - UBS Adam Kramer - Morgan Stanley Operator Please standby. Good day, and welcome to the EQR 2Q '23 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast.

title: Equity Residential (EQR) Meets Q2 FFO, Expects Low Expense Growth
text: Equity Residential's (EQR) Q2 results highlight healthy demand. In the second half of the year, the company expects lower same-store expense growth.

title: Equity Residential (EQR) Q2 Earnings: How Key Metrics Compare to Wall Street Estimates
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Equity Residential (EQR) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Equity Residential (EQR) Q2 FFO Meet Estimates
text: Equity Residential (EQR) came out with quarterly funds from operations (FFO) of $0.94 per share, in line with the Zacks Consensus Estimate. This compares to FFO of $0.89 per share a year ago.

title: Equity Residential Reports Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) today reported results for the quarter and six months ended June 30, 2023.
